formulas.totalMoment: mass1 * x1 + mass2 * x2 + mass3 * x3 + mass4 * x4
formulas.hcg: (mass1 * x1 + mass2 * x2 + mass3 * x3 + mass4 * x4) / (mass1 + mass2 + mass3 + mass4)
